title: The Heartbreaking Disappearance of Paula Welden

scenes.text: A hiking trip leads to a chilling disappearance that remains unsolved.
Paula Welden vanished while hiking in the Green Mountains of Vermont in 1946.
She was seen on the Long Trail but never returned, sparking massive searches.
Reports and articles about her disappearance still circulate today.
Her case remains one of Vermont's greatest mysteries.
scenes.label: A MYSTERY UNRESOLVED

scenes.text: Follow for the cases no one can explain.

description: 📍 Bennington, Vermont - 1946. A young woman disappeared while hiking, leading to extensive searches and leaving behind unanswered questions. Follow for daily mysteries!
